result_summary_zh: Component order now follows labels. Raw condition is split into fixed_damage_1 and damage_reduction_2, both retaining cool/eco-only formation condition and active/accessed direction.
Special format with 発動条件 + 効果(1)/(2)/(3) now splits into def_buff_1, atk_debuff_2, damage_reduction_3. Internal references like (1)発動時 no longer split labels.
Effect (1) ATK buff and effect (2) duration_extension are split. duration_extension is condition-only and remains marked condition_only_component_needs_review.
Component order now shows fixed_damage_1 before additional_fixed_damage_2.
Still unusual. Parser emits def_buff_1 and condition-only battery_disable_3, but recovery effect (2) remains unresolved and record stays suspicious/manual.
Label mismatch remains visible. Additional EXP effect is not filled because value semantics are not safely separated yet.
Effect (1) ATK and condition-only reboot_2 split correctly; probabilities are separated into 100% and 15%. Reboot remains condition-only review.
Label mismatch remains visible. Weather-based secondary EXP effect still needs a dedicated parser or manual snippet.
Duplicate labeled DEF values are now flagged with duplicate_labeled_component_values_need_review.
Label mismatch remains visible for the AP/maxHP-difference additional fixed damage condition.
Parsing still works as before but remains suspicious because score components are not safely mapped to labels in this compound (2)(1) description.
